abstract.text: This class represents the default configuration applied in place of the remote configuration.
Attach Ecommerce User details to events. It is designed to help in modeling guest/non-guest account activity.

Entry point to instance a new Snowplow tracker.
An enum for buffer options.
This class represents the configuration of the subject.
The SubjectConfiguration can be used to setup the tracker with the basic information about the
user and the app which will be attached on all the events as contexts.
The contexts to track can be enabled in the
class.

It allows the tracker configuration from the emission perspective.
The EmitterConfiguration can be used to setup details about how the tracker should treat the events
to emit to the collector.

This class has the basic functionality needed to represent all events.

Error event tracked by exception autotracking.
Media player event fired when the the player finishes buffering content and resumes playback.
Media player event fired when 75% of ad is reached after continuous ad playback at normal speed.
Event tracking the view of an item in a list.
If screen engagement tracking is enabled, the list item view events will be aggregated into a
entity.
Track a promotion view.
Track a refund event. Use the same transaction ID as for the original Transaction event.
Provide a list of products to specify certain products to be refunded, otherwise the whole transaction
will be marked as refunded.

Interface for the component that
sends events to the collector.
Closure used in plugin callbacks to generate entities.
Provided to certain Ecommerce events. The Transaction properties will be sent with the event as a Transaction entity.

Closure used in after track plugin callbacks.
Content for a notification.
Type of media content.
Configuration of tracker properties.
An event that represents the reception of a push notification (or a locally generated one).
A specification for the appearance and interaction of a window.
Result builder used to build a list of configuration objects when creating a new tracker
Media player event sent when the user pauses the playback.
Attach Ecommerce Screen (Page) details to events. It is designed to help with grouping insights by
screen/page type, e.g. Product description, Product list, Home.

instance.

The inspectable properties of the event used to generate contexts.

This class allows the GDPR configuration of the tracker.
Media player event sent when a seek operation begins.
A consent withdrawn event.
Common parent class for configuration classes.
Media player event that signals the ad creative was played to the end at normal speed.
This class allows the setup of Global Contexts which are attached to selected events.
Entity that indicates a deep-link has been received and processed.
Block signature for context generators, takes event information and generates a context.
Represents the network communication configuration allowing the tracker to be able to send events to the Snowplow collector.
Event for a SwiftUI window group being opened.
Properties for the ad break context entity attached to media events during ad break playback.

Block signature for context filtering, takes event information and decide if the context needs to be generated.
Protocol to implement storage for events that are queued to be sent.
A consent granted event.
Entity that indicates the state of the app is visible (foreground) when the event is tracked.
Media player event fired when the user clicked the pause control and stopped the ad creative.
Represents the configuration for fetching configurations from a remote source.
For details on the correct format of a remote configuration see the official documentation.
The properties for all the self-describing events.
This class represents the configuration of the tracker and the core tracker properties.
The TrackerConfiguration can be used to setup the tracker behaviour indicating what should be
tracked in term of automatic tracking and contexts/entities to track with the events.
Media player event fired when the user resumed playing the ad creative after it had been stopped or paused.
Properties for the visionOS immersive space entity.
Entity schema:
Identifies a tracker plugin with a unique identifier. Required for all plugins.

Properties for the media player context entity attached to media events.
Entity schema:
Properties for the ad context entity attached to media events during ad playback.

If screen engagement tracking is enabled, the scroll changed events will be aggregated into a
entity.

Provided to certain Ecommerce events. The Cart properties will be sent with the event as a Cart entity.

Logger delegate to implement in oder to receive logs from the tracker.

Track a product or products being added to cart.
Protocol for tracker plugin definition.

Controller for managing media tracking instances and tracking media events.

Event for a visionOS immersive space being dismissed.
Provides a block closure that returns a list of context entities and is called when events are tracked.
Optionally, you can specify the event schemas for which the block should be called.
Media player event tracked when the resource could not be loaded due to an error.
Properties for the SwiftUI window group entity.
Entity schema:
The properties for all the self-describing events.
Media player event sent when a seek operation completes.
Provided to certain Ecommerce events. The Product properties will be sent with the event as a Product entity.
Entity schema:
This class represents the configuration from of the applications session.
The SessionConfiguration can be used to setup the behaviour of sessions.
Attachment object that identify an attachment in the MessageNotification
This configuration tells the tracker to send requests with the user ID in session context entity
to a Kantar endpoint used with FocalMeter.
The request is made when the first event with a new user ID is tracked.
The requests are only made if session context is enabled (default).
Provides a block closure to be called after events are tracked.
Optionally, you can specify the event schemas for which the block should be called.
The visibility of the user’s upper limbs in a visionOS immersive space.
Allows the tracking of JavaScript events from WebViews.
Protocol for a plugin that provides a closure to generate context entities to enrich events.
Configuration for a custom tracker plugin.
Enables you to add closures to be called when and after events are tracked in the tracker.
Media player event that signals the end of an ad break.
Event for a visionOS immersive space being opened.
Media player event fired when a midpoint of ad is reached after continuous ad playback at normal speed.
Common parent protocol for configuration classes.
